bird.summary: Bates's swift (Apus batesi) is a species of small swift in the family Apodidae which is found in western Africa. Description Bates's swift…

locations.name: 理查德·鮑德勒·夏普
locations.summary: 理查德·鮑德勒·夏普（英語：Richard Bowdler Sharpe，1847年11月22日—1909年12月25日）是一位英國動物學家兼鳥類學家，於大英博物館擔任鳥類標本的策展人。在其職涯裡，夏普出版了一些有關鳥類的專著，並整理出博…

relations.subject: Bates's swift
relations.evidence: Bates's swift (Apus batesi) is a species of small swift in the family Apodidae which is found in western Africa

relations.subject: Bates's swift
relations.evidence: Bates's swift is a rainforest species and is found in areas close to cliffs and crags
